{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Exodus Theory
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Exodus Theory]] is a theory regarding human origins and travel.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
